purpose: Establish a connection; negotiates connection type (Control $10 / Voice Conveyance $20 / Data Conveyance $40 PV2-only), Protocol Version, Max_CAI_Data_Blocks
Periodic liveness; default every 30s; connection lost after 2 missed periods
Response: CONTROL_ACK or one of 11 NAK codes (already-connected, unsupported version, bad parameters, busy, connection failure, …)
Select Squelch mode (digital, analog CTCSS code, etc.)
PV2 — receiver control (REPORT/NORMAL/SELECT/DISABLE/ENABLE); replaces PV1 in-band Voter Control (PT=13); receiver 0 = all
PV2 — arbitrate CAI between voice and data (start data)
PV2 — arbitrate CAI between voice and data (stop data)
